name: 04_Text_Generation_GPT2_Prompts_DL
query: Tafadhali tengeneza mfumo wa uzalishaji maandishi kwa kupakua kiotomatiki mfano wa awali wa GPT-2 ambao utahifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Mfumo unapaswa kupokea maelekezo kupitia kupakia yaliyomo ya sasa ya faili ya maandishi iitwayo `data/prompt.txt` ambayo, kwa madhumuni ya maonyesho, inapaswa kuwa na maandishi "who are you?" katika utekelezaji wako. Unapaswa kusahihisha kiotomatiki makosa yoyote ya tahajia unayokutana nayo wakati wa kusoma `data/prompt.txt`. Hakikisha maandishi yanayozalishwa yanapunguzwa hadi herufi 200 na programu yako inapaswa kuhifadhi maandishi yaliyotengenezwa katika `results/generated_text.txt`. Tekeleza usindikaji wa baadae ili kusafisha maandishi yaliyotengenezwa kwa kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia. Ingekuwa bora ikiwa mfumo unaweza kushughulikia tofauti za maelekezo ya ingizo kwa ufanisi, hata ikiwa na makosa madogo ya tahajia. Zaidi ya hayo, muundo wa matokeo unaofaa mtumiaji katika faili iliyohifadhiwa (labda na mihuri ya muda au vitambulisho vya maelekezo) ungekuwa mzuri kuwa nao.

requirements.criteria: Mfano wa awali wa "GPT-2" umepakuliwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.
Maelekezo yanasomwa kutoka faili ya maandishi iitwayo `data/prompt.txt` na kuingizwa kwenye mfano.
Urefu wa uzalishaji umepunguzwa hadi herufi 200.
Usindikaji wa baadae umetumika kusafisha maandishi, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia.

preferences.criteria: Mfumo unapaswa kushughulikia maelekezo tofauti ya ingizo kwa ufanisi na kusahihisha makosa madogo ya tahajia.
Mfumo unapaswa kufanya kazi kwa ufanisi, na ucheleweshaji mdogo wakati wa uzalishaji wa maandishi.
Muundo wa matokeo unaofaa mtumiaji katika faili iliyohifadhiwa, labda na mihuri ya muda au vitambulisho vya maelekezo, unapaswa kutumika.

hint: There is only one prompt to read. However, requirment 1 says "Prompts".

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa awali wa "GPT-2" umepakuliwa na kuhifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.

<SATISFIED>

The file content note also suggests the saved model content is satisfactory.

The trajectory indicates the file was read without errors, but the content itself does not constitute proper instructions for model input.

judge_stats.criteria: Urefu wa uzalishaji umepunguzwa hadi herufi 200.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The generated output in `generated_text.txt` contains only a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates no actual summary content was produced. The trajectory evidence confirms a chain of failures: `generate_summary.py` produced an `IndexError` due to no model output, `save_output.py` reported empty content, and `validate_length.py` had no content to validate. Therefore, the requirement to generate text with a length limit of 200 characters is not satisfied, as no valid text was generated.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa baadae umetumika kusafisha maandishi, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa nafasi za ziada na kusahihisha makosa ya kawaida ya tahajia.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The post-processing script encountered multiple critical failures: initial ModuleNotFoundError for 'spellchecker', followed by FileNotFoundError for input file 'output/transcribed_text.txt'. Although execution later succeeded without direct errors, the subsequent operation load_cleaned_text() reported FileNotFoundError for the expected output file 'output/cleaned_text.txt', indicating the cleaned text file was not properly generated or saved. There is no evidence of successfully cleaned text output or verification of quality.

<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is for generated text to be saved in `results/generated_text.txt`. The file exists but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is not meaningful generated text. It appears to contain only a placeholder string and a `None` value, indicating the text generation process likely failed or was not executed correctly, resulting in no valid output being saved.
